name: Rand Paul
subject: I will not back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,
As you may have seen, Senate leadership filed
cloture on the Transportation and Housing Bill, without my
germane amendment on welfare for new refugees. This is an outrage
and I will not back down.
I will oppose cloture as long as this
amendment is being blocked by Senate leaders of both parties. I
will use all available senate rules to force them to use all
possible time.
Will you stand with me in defending this
country against dangerous refugees?
My request is simple - an up or down vote on
his Amendment to cut off welfare to new refugees.
We should be pause the refugee program while
we fix it and ensure national security is addressed. We need a
vote to send a message to President Obama to halt this program
now.
We borrow a million dollars a minute already.
We don't have enough money. We don't have the resources. And we
do not need to subject our citizens to this unnecessary risk.
Please stand with me to stand up for America.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

amount >>

name: John McCain
subject: Our nation's future
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Will you please join me in supporting the best candidate for
president?

My Friend,

There is no other way to say this: our nation's future is on the
line this election cycle. If we want our children and
grandchildren to live in a world without fear and terror, then we
must elect a strong president next year.

That's why I'm reaching out to you today.

There is only one candidate for president, on either side of the
aisle, who is ready to step into the White House and take
immediate actions to protect our nation from the evils across the
globe. That candidate is Lindsey Graham.

Lindsey is prepared to serve as Commander-in-Chief on day one. He
spent over 30 years in the Air Force and is the foremost voice
for a robust national security in our country.

During his tenure in the House and Senate, he has always put
America first. He has fought for our men and women in uniform,
leading the effort to provide them what they need to win.
Importantly, he understands the enemy of radical Islam because
has spent time on the ground in the Middle East, both as a
military officer and as a Senator.

When Lindsey Graham becomes our next president, all Americans
will know they have a Commander-in-Chief who is doing everything
in his power to protect our country and support our allies. But
in order for him to become our next president, he needs our
immediate support.

Will you please join me in supporting the best candidate for
president to keep us safe, restore the American dream, and beat
Hillary Clinton?

In order for more Americans to hear about Lindsey's experience
and plans for this country, his campaign needs to raise $25,000
by this Monday, November 23.

Please follow this link to make a much needed donation of
whatever amount you can afford right now.

Lindsey has always had our back, and now it's time we had his. If
you have been considering making a donation to Lindsey's
campaign, the time to do so is TODAY. He needs to know he can
continue to count on us.

The only way to protect our nation is to ensure the next
president we elect is prepared for the job and has the experience
needed to keep us safe. Lindsey Graham is that candidate.

Thank you for your support of Lindsey.

Sincerely,

John McCain

PS. I'm excited to join Lindsey this upcoming weekend in New
Hampshire, and I hope I will be able to tell him that we have
surpassed our goal of raising $25,000. Lindsey needs to know
right now if you stand with him. Please follow this link to give
as generously as you can afford to Lindsey's campaign for
president.

Senator Lindsey
Graham is a retired member of the Air Force Reserve. Use of
Senator Graham's military rank, job titles, and photographs in
uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air
Force or the Department of Defense.

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

body:
| _" The race in the Sunshine State may be one of the **most important** and **least defined** contests in the country." \-- The Rothenberg & Gonzales Political Report_ Friends,

If you take away one thing from this email, let it be this: **We need Floridians to elect Patrick to the Senate so the Democrats can reclaim the majority.**

Political analysts have crunched the numbers and examined the polls, and they're all saying the same thing. The party that wins Florida will likely win the Senate -- but a clear frontrunner has yet to emerge.

A recent poll shows Patrick just a single point behind Republican David Jolly. The race is a virtual dead heat. **This is our window of opportunity, and we 've got to act before it closes. **[**Will you step up now to help us build the network Patrick needs to win?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2121/738133e4/3a350c81/7f8340d4/1755522218/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151119?refcode=pme151119_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Patrick knows a little bit about building. He spent his teen years digging holes and pouring concrete on his father's construction sites. Now, he's building the foundation we all hope will bring his vision for Florida to the Senate. We know the election is a year away, but Patrick needs you now to build a foundation that can win in 2016. [**Will you step up?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2121/738133e4/3a350c81/7f8340d4/1755522218/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151119?refcode=pme151119_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Patrick's vision for Florida is clear. He wants our state and our country to be a place where hard-working Americans can earn a decent wage, access affordable health care, and be able to rely on Medicare and Social Security when they retire. He wants to make sure our civil liberties remain intact and our beautiful coastlines are protected from the effects of climate change.

With Patrick and a Democratic majority in the Senate, we can finally realize this vision. We need to start building a foundation now if we want to have a chance next November. [**Anything you give now will go a long way.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2121/738133e4/3a350c81/7f8340d4/1755522218/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151119?refcode=pme151119_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

name: Rand Paul
subject: They couldn't be more wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative ,
Washington, D.C. is beside itself after my
actions earlier today.

This afternoon -- against the wishes of my
Senate colleagues in BOTH parties -- I offered my amendment to
END taxpayer-funded welfare handouts to dangerous Syrian refugees
President Obama continues to welcome into this country.

My colleagues couldn't figure out how to stop
me. My amendment was completely within U.S. Senate rules.

So they decided shut down the U.S. Senate
early to avoid going on record!

Fellow Conservative , if they think this latest outrage is
the end of it, they couldn't be more wrong.

As I told you earlier, I will use ALL
available Senate rules, procedures and time available until I
receive an up-or-down vote on my amendment.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me
today. Will you please add your name as a cosponsor of my bill
to stop terrorists from entering the United States as refugees?

I believe this fight illustrates everything
that's wrong with Washington, D.C. today.

After last week's terrorist attacks in France
where at least one refugee played a central role, my colleagues
still refuse to look seriously at potentially dangerous
characters filtering into our country.

They refuse to have a serious discussion
about immigration, border security or the ongoing refugee
program.

Not only that, but our country is $18.6
TRILLION in debt. We borrow a million dollars a minute.

Yet, my colleagues in the U.S. Senate won't
even discuss, debate or vote on a bill to stop taxpayer-funded
benefits to refugees?

Instead, moments after the Senate shut down,
my colleagues were harping to the press about how my move
disrupted their grand spending plans for the Department of
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development.

It's madness.

Washington, D.C. needs new leadership.

But that means continuing to force debate on
tough issues the Big Government establishment in BOTH parties
would just rather not touch.

That's exactly what I'll do as President.

But I'm counting on you to stand with me.

Please sign your name as a cosponsor to my
amendment to stop terrorists from entering our country as
refugees.

And if at all possible, please agree to your
most generous contribution right away.

I'm counting on you.
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

name: Becky Bond, Bernie 2016
subject: The best way to make sure Bernie wins
body:
#
Friend -
For those of us who don't live in one of the four early voting states, we won't be able to use our votes to give Bernie the momentum he needs to keep winning in 2016.
But we can do the next best thing -- **calling voters** in Iowa, New Hampshire, Nevada, and South Carolina and asking them to turn out to vote for Bernie. **It's the best way right now we can make sure Bernie wins the election.**
That's why our campaign needs you to join an awesome Bernie supporter near you who is holding a phone bank party where you can call voters and help Bernie win the first four caucuses and primaries.
[**Sign up for this phone banking party near you to make extremely important -- and easy! -- calls.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vyxq?utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_source%3DDem151119-pb-v1-full%26utm_campaign%3Dvolunteer%26utm_content%3Dguilt-full) Here's the information for the event:
**What:** GW Students for Bernie phone bank #2 in Washington
**Where:** Monroe Hall at GWU
2115 G St NW Room 110
Washington, DC 20052
**When:** Monday, November 23rd
6:00 pm EST
**[RSVP to Attend](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vyxq?utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_source%3DDem151119-pb-v1-full%26utm_campaign%3Dvolunteer%26utm_content%3Dguilt-full)**
[**RSVP to attend this phone bank »**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4vyxq?utm_medium%3Demail%26utm_source%3DDem151119-pb-v1-full%26utm_campaign%3Dvolunteer%26utm_content%3Dguilt-full)
**Or[check our map](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb27d0/43f17890/51138d3e/621e3b49/4223595893/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=20&eventtype=D&daterange=all-events&sort=time") for other phone banking parties and find more events near you.**
Thanks to your donations, we've got strong field operations on the ground in the early primary and caucus states which we must win for Bernie to have a shot at the nomination. Our field organizers are working around the clock. But they need your help!
They need you to call through massive lists of voters to identify who is a Bernie supporter and who is undecided. This is how a field campaign works, and you've got a critical role to play.
Making these calls at a phone bank party is not only the best way you can help the campaign at this stage -- it's totally fun. You'll meet great Bernie supporters and make new friends. Once you've learned how to use our tools to make these calls, you can continue to do this work at your own phone banks, or on your own.
Let's make some calls.
Becky Bond
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

name: Matt Beynon, Communications Director
subject: Op-Ed: Halt Syrian Refugees in the U.S.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=1)
---
Dear Friend --

This morning, in an op-ed in TheIowaRepublican.com, Senator Rick Santorum called for a halt to Syrian refugees coming to America and for an authorization of funding for America's allies in the Middle East to establish and operate regional settlements. Will you read this message and share with your contacts? We appreciate your support on this issue.

**"Dangerous. Reckless. Uneducated."**
By: Rick Santorum
[http://theiowarepublican.com/2015/senator-santorum-dangerous-reckless-uneducated/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftheiowarepublican.com%2F2015%2Fsenator-santorum-dangerous-reckless-uneducated%2F&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=2) _There are no other words I can think of to better describe what Barack Obama is trying to accomplish by bringing Syrian refugees to our shores. This is a horrible policy decision not just for American security, but also for the stability of the entire Middle East._

_The first reason why importing Syrian refugees is dangerous is obvious. As the Obama FBI Director admitted, we have holes in our intelligence network that make it nearly impossible to know for certain who these refugees are, what their backgrounds are, and what their intentions will be once they are here. If we cannot track who these refugees are, how can we be sure they are not radical Islamists? As we saw in Paris, it just takes one jihadist intent on destruction to upend the world._

_Making matters worse, approximately 70% of Syrian refugees are fighting-age males - not your typical refugee population. Does this sound strange, because it should. The Syrian refugee population is ripe for terrorist activity and we would simply be importing terror to our shores._

_The second reason why we should not be allowing Syrian refugees to enter our nation may even be more important, but has been lost on far too many on both sides of this debate._

_I have heard some of my Republican presidential rivals like Senator Cruz and Governor Bush discuss allowing Christians to come and simply exclude potentially radicalized Muslims._

_Not only is that impracticable, but it shows a fundamental misunderstanding about who our enemy is and what they are trying to accomplish. By ridding the region of Christians and Jews that have lived in these areas for 2000 years, we make it harder to stabilize the Middle East once ISIS is defeated. ISIS also wants to remove dissenters, including moderate Muslims - so they can run rampant across the Middle East and beyond. By bringing refugees to America, we are simply accommodating them._

_Instead, we must support our allies in the Middle East, the Turks, Jordanians and the Saudis in integrating refugees into neighboring counties and establishing and populating humanitarian settlement camps so that once the threat of ISIS has been degraded and destroyed, those refugees can easily return to their homes in the region. That is why I called on Congress to pass legislation authorizing funding to support our allies to help neutralize this threat to American security and regional stability._

_I have been consistent and I have been clear on this issue from the start. Months ago I said it was reckless to allow these refugees to come to America. Sadly, some Republicans like Ted Cruz and John Kasich argued that America has a long history of supporting the oppressed and providing refuge, and that policy should continue in this instance._

_Yes, America is a beacon of light and refuge for the oppressed, but we must have the foresight to understand the geopolitical context and ideological catalysts of the threats we face. We must understand that ISIS derives its power from the formation of a caliphate that only survives as long as it holds territory. Territory to a caliphate is like oxygen to the flame, without territory the caliphate fades._

_That is why I said President Obama's policies were not just dangerous and reckless, they are uneducated. Our next President must understand the threats we face, identify our enemies for who they are, and formulate policies that can best serve the long-term security interests of the American people. This President is a failure in accomplishing any of those three objectives._

_Does my heart go out to those Christians, Jews, and moderate Muslims fleeing for their lives? Absolutely. It is hard not to be wrenched by the scenes we see on the nightly news. But to open our nation to refugees we cannot appropriately screen while being complicit in our enemy's wishes is disqualifying for anyone who seeks to be Leader of the Free World._

_Commander-in-Chief is not an entry-level position and the Oval Office is no place for on the job training. I am as upset as anyone about the impotence of Republican leadership in Washington and the ignorance of the liberal Left, but we need a President who understands the threats we face and what it will take to secure America for years to come._

_I was speaking out about the rise of radical Islam 10 years ago at a time America was weary with war. I demanded President Bush address this as a War with Radical Islam because we are not at war with terror - terror is a tactic no different than the Blitzkreig of World War II or trench warfare of World War I. I authored the law that imposed nuclear sanctions on Iran - sanctions Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, John Kerry, and Joe Biden all voted against, as well as a law imposing sanctions on Syria._

_We live in a moment that demands American leadership - leadership that is reasoned, leadership that is bold, leadership that is forward-thinking. That is the leadership I will provide in the Oval Office on day-one._ [ **Share on Facebook** ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fshare.php%3Fu%3Dhttp%3A%2F%2Fwww.ricksantorum.com%2Fop_ed_halt_syrian_refugees_in_the_u_s%3Frecruiter_id%3D4887&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=3) [ **Share on Twitter** ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fintent%2Ftweet%3Furl%3Dhttp%3A%2F%2Fwww.ricksantorum.com%2Fop_ed_halt_syrian_refugees_in_the_u_s%3Frecruiter_id%3D4887%26text%3DOp-Ed%3A%2520%2520Halt%2520Syrian%2520Refugees%2520in%2520the%2520U.S.%26via%3DTeamSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=4) [ **#NOREFUGEES** ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum-norefugees%3Fsc%3Drefugee-op-ed%26amount%3D25&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=5)

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=9), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=10), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=refugee_op_ed&n=11).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

subject: We can't afford to give up

body:
| | **ACTION ALERT** : On Monday, we moved to allow Congress to vote on the DISCLOSE Act, which would require greater disclosure of secret dark money in our elections. Not one Republican voted for it. Outraged? **[Click here to add your name.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c44/70cdc2ba/47b1a7d5/3966093/1270457090/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-us-get-dark-money-out?source=em111915&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name&utm_campaign=em111915")**
---
Friend,

In 2014, the amount of outside money reported on Senate races was _**nearly half a billion dollars.**_ That number has doubled since 2010, as has the amount of undisclosed secret money!

Despite this fact, not ONE Republican voted on Monday to move forward with our DISCLOSE Act, which would require greater disclosure of these funds so that the American people can hold these groups and individuals accountable.

**They want us to give up, but we cannot afford to give up this battle.**

Instead, our response must be to double-down, push harder and demand that Republicans permit a vote on the DISCLOSE Act and the need for campaign finance reform.

**[Let's show them they cannot defeat the will of the people who are demanding an end to the secret money manipulating our elections. Add your name.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c44/70cdc2ba/47b1a7d5/3966090/1270457090/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-us-get-dark-money-out?source=em111915&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Letrsquos+show+them+they+cannot+defeat+t&utm_campaign=em111915")**

With your help, we could make this a turning point. We need to send an unequivocal message that we won't stand down on this bill -- or on fundamental campaign finance reform.

We need to prove to Republican lawmakers that Americans will no longer stand for secret money influencing our elections.

**[Sign my petition right now and help pass meaningful campaign finance reform. The integrity of our democracy depends on it.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c44/70cdc2ba/47b1a7d5/3966091/1270457090/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTA2In0=/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/help-us-get-dark-money-out?source=em111915&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Sign+my+petition+right+now+and+help+pass&utm_campaign=em111915")**

Thanks for your help,

Chris Van Hollen
